what: Every drop trigger 1-5% x every bounce-back target 1-5%, on real crypto history.
why: Settles the entry+exit thresholds with evidence, and elects a champion drop, a champion bounce-back, and the best combo — like the strategy champion.
action: Champion the combo per book once un-paused. The accuracy champion = highest hit-rate (safer, good for downtrends); the expectancy champion = best return (more aggressive, good for uptrends).
note: Hit_rate = % of oversold entries that reached the bounce target within ~3h. Expectancy = avg outcome selling at target, else holding to horizon. Crypto only until other books have history. Recommends; does not change live params.
